'''Angela Krin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] who served in the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority's]] fleet.

==Biography==
Krin was the commander of the [[Resolute (Invincible-class)|''Resolute'']], an [[Invincible-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser|''Invincible''-class Dreadnaught]] which enforced the quarantine of [[Endregaad]], in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]]. Shortly thereafter she received a promotion to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]]. She later played a major role in confounding the schemes of [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera]].

{{Char-stub}}
